recommendations: Ensure consistent and accurate relative positioning for all drawer and handle components. Currently, 'drawer_top_left' and 'drawer_top_right' are at [0,0,0], and all handles share the same absolute position [0.9, 0, 0.48]. This will be crucial for proper functional layout in later stages.

drawer_middle_right.computation_notes: Smaller drawer slide mechanism. Width based on 18% of drawer width (777mm). Reduced damping for lighter drawer mass.

drawer_middle_left.computation_notes: Smaller drawer slide mechanism. Width based on 18% of drawer width (753mm). Reduced damping for lighter drawer mass.

drawer_top_right.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with soft-close damping. Width based on 18% of drawer width (2237mm). Damping calculated for controlled closure over 1.5s travel distance.

drawer_bottom_left.computation_notes: Smaller drawer slide mechanism. Width based on 18% of drawer width (769mm). Reduced damping for lighter drawer mass.

drawer_bottom_right.computation_notes: Smaller drawer slide mechanism. Width based on 18% of drawer width (783mm). Reduced damping for lighter drawer mass.

drawer_top_left.computation_notes: Drawer slide mechanism with soft-close damping. Width based on 18% of drawer width (2225mm). Damping calculated for controlled closure over 1.5s travel distance.
